_rationale: debug export schemas are intentionally disjoint between Go and C++ ports: Go's `lci debug export` re-indexes Go-files-only with SymbolLinkerEngine and emits {summary, files[], extractors[], resolvers[], dependencies}; C++'s `lci debug export` queries the running server and emits {file_count, symbol_count, root, ready, build_duration_ms, ...}. No common fields exist. Decision C (parity 5/9 / aKbWRRmO5BDp): suppress the entire payload in the ignore tier to declare known divergence at exit-code level only. Integration test mirrors this — golden is `{}` because every field is in the ignore tier. See MODULE_MAP.md > Known Divergences.
